com.tonic.jaloc.impl.arrays

Class PShortArray

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs.AbstractNativeArray<W>
      • com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs.AbstractPrimitiveArray<PShortWriter>
        • com.tonic.jaloc.impl.arrays.PShortArray
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.lang.AutoCloseable

    public final class PShortArray
extends AbstractPrimitiveArray<PShortWriter>
    A fixed-length native short array.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      PShortArray(long length)
      Allocates length elements on the system allocator, zeroed.
      PShortArray(NativeAllocator allocator, long length)
      Allocates length elements on the given allocator, zeroed.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      long binarySearch(long fromIndex, long toIndex, short value)
      Binary searches fromIndex inclusive to toIndex exclusive; content must be sorted.
      long binarySearch(short value)
      Binary searches the whole array; content must be sorted.
      void copyFrom(short[] source, int sourceIndex, long destinationIndex, int length)
      Bulk copies length elements from source into this array.
      void copyTo(long sourceIndex, short[] destination, int destinationIndex, int length)
      Bulk copies length elements from this array into destination.
      short get(long index)
      Reads the element at index.
      short getUnchecked(long index)
      Reads the element at index with no liveness or bounds check; the caller must have proven both.
      void set(long index, short value)
      Writes the element at index.
      void setUnchecked(long index, short value)
      Writes the element at index with no liveness or bounds check; the caller must have proven both.
      void sort()
      Sorts the whole array ascending.
      void sort(long fromIndex, long toIndex)
      Sorts fromIndex inclusive to toIndex exclusive, ascending.
      PShortWriter writer() 

      • Methods inherited from class com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs.AbstractPrimitiveArray

        clearRange, elementSize

      • Methods inherited from class com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs.AbstractNativeArray

        byteSize, clear, close, isEmpty, isOpen, length, writer

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • PShortArray

        public PShortArray(long length)
        Allocates length elements on the system allocator, zeroed.
        Parameters:
        length - the element count
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if length is negative

      • PShortArray

        public PShortArray(NativeAllocator allocator,
                   long length)
        Allocates length elements on the given allocator, zeroed.
        Parameters:
        allocator - the allocator to source memory from
        length - the element count
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if length is negative

    • Method Detail

      • get

        public short get(long index)
        Reads the element at index.
        Parameters:
        index - the element index
        Returns:
        the element
        Throws:
        java.lang.IndexOutOfBoundsException - if index is out of range
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • set

        public void set(long index,
                short value)
        Writes the element at index.
        Parameters:
        index - the element index
        value - the value to store
        Throws:
        java.lang.IndexOutOfBoundsException - if index is out of range
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • getUnchecked

        public short getUnchecked(long index)
        Reads the element at index with no liveness or bounds check; the caller must have proven both.
        Parameters:
        index - the element index
        Returns:
        the element

      • setUnchecked

        public void setUnchecked(long index,
                         short value)
        Writes the element at index with no liveness or bounds check; the caller must have proven both.
        Parameters:
        index - the element index
        value - the value to store

      • writer

        public PShortWriter writer()
        Specified by:
        writer in class AbstractNativeArray<PShortWriter>
        Returns:
        a fresh writer at position zero

      • sort

        public void sort()
        Sorts the whole array ascending.
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • sort

        public void sort(long fromIndex,
                 long toIndex)
        Sorts fromIndex inclusive to toIndex exclusive, ascending.
        Parameters:
        fromIndex - the range start, inclusive
        toIndex - the range end, exclusive
        Throws:
        java.lang.IndexOutOfBoundsException - if the range is out of bounds
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • binarySearch

        public long binarySearch(short value)
        Binary searches the whole array; content must be sorted.
        Parameters:
        value - the value to find
        Returns:
        the matching index, or -(insertionPoint + 1) if absent
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • binarySearch

        public long binarySearch(long fromIndex,
                         long toIndex,
                         short value)
        Binary searches fromIndex inclusive to toIndex exclusive; content must be sorted.
        Parameters:
        fromIndex - the range start, inclusive
        toIndex - the range end, exclusive
        value - the value to find
        Returns:
        the matching index, or -(insertionPoint + 1) if absent
        Throws:
        java.lang.IndexOutOfBoundsException - if the range is out of bounds
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • copyFrom

        public void copyFrom(short[] source,
                     int sourceIndex,
                     long destinationIndex,
                     int length)
        Bulk copies length elements from source into this array.
        Parameters:
        source - the heap array to read from
        sourceIndex - the start within source
        destinationIndex - the start within this array
        length - the element count
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - if source is null
        java.lang.IndexOutOfBoundsException - if either range is out of bounds
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • copyTo

        public void copyTo(long sourceIndex,
                   short[] destination,
                   int destinationIndex,
                   int length)
        Bulk copies length elements from this array into destination.
        Parameters:
        sourceIndex - the start within this array
        destination - the heap array to write into
        destinationIndex - the start within destination
        length - the element count
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - if destination is null
        java.lang.IndexOutOfBoundsException - if either range is out of bounds
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed
